name: luck-distribution
description: Validate higher Luck monotonically improves non-common rarity chances and pet inventory actions remain consistent.

args.code: local H=game:GetService("HttpService") local cfg=require(game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage"):WaitForChild("GameConfig")) local a=cfg.PetChances(1) local b=cfg.PetChances(2) local c=cfg.PetChances(5) local d=cfg.PetChances(10) local nonCommon={1-a["Brick Pup"],1-b["Brick Pup"],1-c["Brick Pup"],1-d["Brick Pup"]} local monotonic=nonCommon[1]<nonCommon[2] and nonCommon[2]<nonCommon[3] and nonCommon[3]<nonCommon[4] local secretMonotonic=a["Secret Titan Golem"]<b["Secret Titan Golem"] and b["Secret Titan Golem"]<c["Secret Titan Golem"] and c["Secret Titan Golem"]<d["Secret Titan Golem"] return H:JSONEncode({monotonic=monotonic,secretMonotonic=secretMonotonic,commonDecreases=a["Brick Pup"]>d["Brick Pup"],secret1=a["Secret Titan Golem"],secret10=d["Secret Titan Golem"]})

local H=game:GetService("HttpService") local c=game:GetService("ServerStorage"):WaitForChild("PunchWallAutomation") c:Invoke("Reset") c:Invoke("SetStats",{Coins=1000}) local hatch=c:Invoke("HatchPet") local pet=hatch.pet local before=H:JSONDecode(hatch.PetInventoryJSON) local unequip=c:Invoke("UnequipPet",pet) local equip=c:Invoke("EquipPet",pet) local deleted=c:Invoke("DeletePet",pet) local after=H:JSONDecode(deleted.PetInventoryJSON) return H:JSONEncode({hatched=hatch.ok,inventoryAdded=#before==1,unequip=unequip.ok,equip=equip.ok,deleted=deleted.ok,inventoryRemoved=#after==0})
